UpTools Discipline Tracker

⚽ FIFA World Cup 2026 Discipline Tracker

Track yellow cards, red cards, and fair play points across all World Cup 2026 matches. Updated after every game.

📊 Team Discipline Sorted by Total Cards

#TeamMatchesYellowRedTotalFair Play Pts

👤 Player Cards Sorted by Total

#PlayerTeamYellowRedTotal

❓ FAQ

✅ Do's & Don'ts

✅ Do's

  • Check discipline before placing bets
  • Track key players on yellow card warning
  • Use fair play points for knockout predictions
  • Compare team discipline across groups
  • Bookmark for quick reference during matches

❌ Don'ts

  • Assume past discipline predicts future results
  • Ignore red card suspensions for next match
  • Rely solely on card stats for match analysis
  • Forget that two yellows = one match ban
  • Use outdated data after matchday updates

⚙️ How It Works

1

Match Data

We collect official FIFA match reports after each game.

2

Card Tracking

Every yellow and red card is logged per player and team.

3

Fair Play Points

Calculated: Yellow=1pt, SecondYellow=2pts, StraightRed=3pts.

4

Live Updates

Stats refresh automatically after each match concludes.
